name_en: Standing Statue of a Deva-Form Deity
description_en: This standing statue of a deva-form (tenbu) deity is a sculpture in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Tsukuba City and was designated on 1984-05-24. It is located in Kitaota.

name_en: Site of the Former Wakamori Prefectural Office
description_en: The site of the former Wakamori prefectural office is a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Tsukuba City and was designated on 1984-09-01. It is located in Wakamori.

description_en: The Kokai River ferry crossing and its roadside deity (dosojin) form a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Tsukuba City and was designated on 1984-09-01. It is located in Yoshinuma.
